title: Litewer's AI girlfriend (GF)
description: A realistic AI companion for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 with emotional dialogue, memory, gifts, customizable looks, and interactive companion behavior.
body:
# ✨ AIGF

AIGF Companion adds a realistic AI girl companion to Minecraft Forge 1.20.1.  
She can talk with you, react emotionally, remember promises, accept gifts, wear gear, use custom skins, and behave like a real companion instead of a simple NPC.

![Love](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/787581a10185dd1deac1843bcfb6f51132c00f74.png)

## 💖 Features

- 💬 Real AI dialogue in-game
- 😊 Mood, trust, energy, and conflict system
- 🎁 Unique gift reactions to Minecraft items
- 🏠 Home point and go-home behavior
- 🪪 Rename support
- 👗 Custom skins and appearance
- 🛡️ Companion inventory with armor, weapon, and offhand
- 🧠 Promise and memory system
- 🌍 Russian and English support
- 🤖 AI provider support: OpenAI, Gemini, OpenRouter

![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75d9401bf72d4cf0360badb57e9f96db92388ee6.png)

## 🕹️ Guide

### Spawn
Use:
`/aigf spawn`

### Menu
Right-click the companion.

### Setup
Open `Settings` and:
- choose provider
- paste API key
- choose model
- save settings

### Chat
You can talk in two ways:
- through her UI chat
- in normal Minecraft chat with `@aigf <message>`

Example:
`@aigf hello`
`@aigf follow me`
`@aigf let's talk`

### Actions
You can:
- tell her to follow you
- tell her to stay
- tell her to sit
- set home
- send her home
- rename her
- change her skin
- give her gifts
- equip armor and weapons

![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1279fcdb0bdeafc9435549f32a872fa821f9310f.png)

## 🎭 Bond

Your words matter.

- 💗 Kind words can improve mood and trust
- 💢 Insults can hurt her and create conflict
- 🥀 Broken promises affect trust
- 🌸 Good gifts can make her happy
- 😶 Bad or weird gifts can annoy or confuse her

She does not always react the same way.  
Her behavior changes depending on your relationship.

![Care](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce9d92afda0c62ef8d851fc15652fc79ccebfe08.png)

## 🎁 Gifts

You can gift items from your main hand through the UI.

She reacts to Minecraft items in different ways:
- cute items
- useful items
- valuable items
- weird items
- useless junk
- dangerous items

That means gifts feel personal, not generic.

![Gift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f394aeee457049921bf0f2a2c3a76f1398af5b5.png)

## 🏠 Home

You can set a home point for her and send her back anytime.  
She can follow you, wait, sit, or go home depending on what you tell her.

## ⚙️ Requirements

- Minecraft `1.20.1`
- Forge `47.4.16`
- Java `17`

## 🚧 Status

This mod is still in active development and will keep getting major updates focused on:
- deeper personality
- better memory
- smarter world awareness
- stronger relationship systems

## 🌹 AIGF

A companion made to feel emotional, personal, and alive inside your Minecraft world.
